arts.ttl: Southampton vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Managerless Southampton welcome Liverpool to St. Mary’s Stadium in the Carabao Cup quarter-finals tonight. Russell Martin was relieved of his duties as Southampton manager after his side lost 5-0 at home to Tottenham on Sunday night. arts.sum: Liverpool have improved their contract offer to star player Trent Alexander-Arnold, but it’s still not clear if he’s ready to accept the proposal as Real Madrid continue to hover. arts.ttl: Liverpool must keep an eye on new Premier League star - I don't think Harry Kane transfer happens

arts.ttl: €60m offer prepared: Liverpool rival Arsenal for 23-year-old with 15 G/A already this season
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly preparing to try making a €60million bid for the transfer of Atalanta playmaker Charles De Ketelaere. The talented Belgium international has been on fire this season, contributing a hugely impressive six goals and nine assists in all competitions so far this term. arts.ttl: 20 G/A this season: Liverpool & Arsenal seriously interested in world class attacker transfer
arts.sum: Liverpool and Arsenal are reportedly both showing a strong interest in the potential transfer of Atalanta star Ademola Lookman following his superb form. arts.ttl: Why Liverpool boss Arne Slot isn't on the touchline for Southampton clash
arts.sum: Arne Slot will be watching Liverpool's trip to Southampton from the stands at St Mary's Stadium, as his Reds side aim to reach the semi-finals of the Carabao Cup
